_notes.keep_in_sync: When you change category slugs or hierarchy in categories_v1.json, update _category_attributes paths here and add entries to units if new unit symbols are needed. Keys are slash-separated slug chains under each top-level branch (materials, tools & gear, services) — e.g. power_tools/drills_and_drivers — not the JSON wrapper name; depth is unbounded.
_notes.elevation_rule: Attributes are placed at the highest node where ALL children share them. If only some children share an attribute, it lives on those specific children.
_notes.unit_required: true means a unit must be selected when setting the value (e.g. length=12, unit=ft). false means it is a free-text or unitless value.

%.name: Percent
%.description: Percentage value (moisture content, slope, elongation, etc.)

fl oz.name: Fluid Ounce
fl oz.description: US fluid ounce for cartridge, tube, and pail volume

grade.name: Grade
grade.description: Lumber grade, steel grade, or quality grade (facet)

mil.name: Mil
mil.description: Thousandths of an inch — poly sheeting, wear layers, film

min.name: Minutes
min.description: Working time, set time, pot life

ton.name: Ton

yd.name: Yard
yd.description: Fabric, rope, or bulk linear measure
